title: Grizzly Peak
description: A bold, tasty wine with ripe blackberry and cassis flavors, framed by firm tannins and a long, smoky finish. Notes of cedar, vanilla and dark chocolate emerge with air. Full-bodied and structured, it pairs beautifully with grilled red meat.

title: Silver Creek Reserve
description: A creamy, buttery Chardonnay with aromas of baked apple, lemon curd and toasted oak. Rich on the palate with a balanced acidity and a lingering, nutty finish. A crowd-pleasing white that suits roast chicken and creamy pastas.

title: Maison Lefevre Brut
description: An elegant, crisp sparkling wine with fine, persistent bubbles. Bright notes of green apple, brioche and citrus zest lead to a dry, mineral-driven finish. Refined and festive, perfect as an aperitif or with oysters.

title: Tuscan Sun Sangiovese
description: A vibrant, food-friendly red with juicy cherry, dried herb and leather notes. Medium-bodied with bright acidity and savory tannins. A classic Tuscan style that shines alongside tomato-based pasta and aged cheeses.

title: Rioja Gran Tinto
description: A warm, generous red showing plum, fig and vanilla from extended oak aging. Smooth tannins and flavors of tobacco and dried fig make this a complex, satisfying pour. Excellent with lamb and grilled vegetables.

title: Marlborough Breeze
description: A zesty, aromatic white bursting with passion fruit, lime and fresh-cut grass. Crisp and refreshing with a clean, racy finish. A bright, tasty wine ideal for seafood, salads and warm afternoons.

title: Willamette Whisper
description: A silky, elegant Pinot Noir with delicate red cherry, raspberry and forest-floor aromas. Light to medium-bodied with soft tannins and a graceful, earthy finish. Pairs wonderfully with salmon and mushroom dishes.

title: Mendoza Alto
description: A plush, inky Malbec brimming with blackberry, blueberry and mocha. Velvety tannins and a hint of violet lead to a rich, lingering finish. A bold, tasty wine that loves grilled steak and barbecue.

title: Mosel Slate Riesling
description: An off-dry Riesling with electric acidity and aromas of green apple, apricot and wet slate. Delicately sweet on entry, then bright and mineral on the finish. A versatile white that balances spicy Asian cuisine beautifully.

title: Barossa Ironbark
description: A powerful, full-bodied Shiraz packed with blackberry jam, black pepper and licorice. Warming and concentrated with robust tannins and a smoky, savory finish. Made for hearty stews and grilled lamb.

title: Loire Stone
description: A bright, honeyed white with quince, pear and chamomile notes over a chalky, mineral core. Lively acidity keeps it fresh and lifted through a long finish. A lovely match for goat cheese and roast pork.

title: Napa Crest Merlot
description: A smooth, approachable Merlot offering ripe plum, black cherry and a touch of cocoa. Soft, rounded tannins and a gentle, fruity finish make it easy to enjoy on its own or with roast chicken and pasta.

title: Douro Heritage
description: A dense, aromatic red with violet, blueberry and crushed-rock minerality. Firm yet polished tannins frame a deep, savory palate and a long, perfumed finish. A distinctive, tasty wine that pairs with game and aged cheese.

title: Sonoma Gold
description: A jammy, exuberant Zinfandel loaded with raspberry, blackberry and baking spice. Bold and slightly sweet on the mid-palate with a peppery, warming finish. A fun, tasty wine for burgers, ribs and pizza night.
